It features a 155cc liquid-cooled engine with VVA technology that produces 15 PS of power and 13.9 Nm of torque. The scooter can hit an impressive top speed of 120 kmph, making it suitable for both city and short highway runs. The Version S update introduces a Smart Key system with keyless ignition and an answer-back feature. It comes equipped with a traction control system (TCS), which is a segment-first for scooters in India. The 14-inch large wheels provide motorcycle-like stability and cornering confidence. It features a 5.8-inch LCD display with smartphone connectivity for comprehensive ride data. The fuel tank is placed in the center tunnel, allowing for a massive 24.5-liter under-seat storage area.

name: Hero Destini Prime
text: Hero Destini Prime is a scooter bike. It has 110.0cc engine, gives 45 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.71 Lakh. The Hero Destini Prime is a budget-friendly yet premium-looking scooter aimed at family buyers in India. It is powered by a 110.9cc air-cooled engine that produces a maximum power of 9 PS and a peak torque of 10.36 Nm. The scooter is capable of reaching a top speed of 85 kmph, making it ideal for daily errands and short city commutes. It features Hero's patented i3S technology which helps in saving fuel by switching off the engine during brief stops. The design is elegant with chrome accents and a metal body that ensures durability on Indian roads. It comes with a semi-digital instrument cluster and an external fuel filling cap for added convenience. The under-seat storage is generous and includes a mobile charging port and a boot light. The suspension consists of telescopic forks at the front and a mono-shock at the rear for a plush ride.

name: TVS Jupiter 125
text: TVS Jupiter 125 is a scooter bike. It has 124.0cc engine, gives 50 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.86 Lakh. The TVS Jupiter 125 is a flagship scooter from TVS designed to redefine the 125cc family scooter segment. It is equipped with a 124.8cc air-cooled engine that generates a peak power of 8.15 PS and a maximum torque of 10.5 Nm. The scooter can reach a top speed of 95 kmph, offering a punchy and smooth performance for city riding. One of its standout features is the massive 33-liter under-seat storage that can easily accommodate two full-face helmets. The fuel tank is uniquely placed under the floorboard with the filler cap located at the front apron for easy access. It features a semi-digital instrument cluster with 'IntelliGO' technology for better fuel management at traffic lights. The seat is class-leading in length, ensuring maximum comfort for both the rider and the pillion. For braking, it offers an optional 220mm front disc brake with a synchronized braking system.

name: Honda Dio 125
text: Honda Dio 125 is a scooter bike. It has 123.0cc engine, gives 48 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.83 Lakh. The Honda Dio 125 is a sporty and stylish scooter that builds on the legacy of the original Dio brand in India. It is powered by a 123.97cc fuel-injected engine that produces 8.28 PS of power and 10.4 Nm of torque. The scooter can reach a top speed of 90 kmph, providing an exciting ride for the younger demographic. It features an aggressive design with a signature LED headlamp and a dual-outlet muffler for a sporty exhaust note. The H-Smart variant includes a smart key for keyless entry, remote locking, and an anti-theft system. It is equipped with a fully digital instrument cluster that provides real-time fuel efficiency and distance-to-empty readouts. The telescopic front suspension and a 12-inch front wheel offer excellent stability and cornering confidence. For safety, it features a front disc brake with Honda’s Combi-Brake System (CBS).

name: Suzuki Burgman Street EX
text: Suzuki Burgman Street EX is a scooter bike. It has 124.0cc engine, gives 48 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 1.14 Lakh. The Suzuki Burgman Street EX is a premium maxi-scooter that offers a unique and luxurious riding experience. It is powered by a 124cc air-cooled engine with Suzuki Eco Performance Alpha technology, producing 8.6 PS of power and 10 Nm of torque. The scooter has a top speed of 95 kmph, making it a capable highway and city cruiser. This EX variant features a larger 12-inch rear wheel for improved stability and a more planted ride quality. It comes with an integrated Engine Stop Start (EESS) system and Silent Starter System for a premium operational feel. The design is bulky and impressive, offering a wide floorboard and a very comfortable seat for long-distance riding. The digital instrument console is Bluetooth-enabled and provides turn-by-turn navigation and smartphone alerts.

name: Yamaha Fascino 125 Fi Hybrid
text: Yamaha Fascino 125 Fi Hybrid is a scooter bike. It has 125.0cc engine, gives 55 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.81 Lakh. The Yamaha Fascino 125 Fi Hybrid is a retro-styled scooter that brings modern hybrid technology to the Indian market. It is equipped with a 125cc air-cooled engine assisted by a Smart Motor Generator (SMG), producing 8.2 PS of power and 10.3 Nm of torque. The scooter can reach a top speed of 90 kmph, offering a smooth and vibration-free ride for city dwellers. The hybrid system provides an electric power assist during initial acceleration, which improves pickup and fuel efficiency. It features a beautiful classic design with high-quality paint finishes and chrome detailing. The scooter is one of the lightest in its category, weighing only 99 kg, which makes it incredibly easy to handle. It comes with an LED headlamp and a digital instrument cluster that supports the Y-Connect app for smartphone integration.

name: TVS XL100
text: TVS XL100 is a moped bike. It has 99.0cc engine, gives 65 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.47 Lakh. The TVS XL100 is India's most popular multi-utility moped, known for its heavy-duty performance and reliability. It features a 99.7cc four-stroke engine that generates a maximum power of 4.4 PS and a peak torque of 6.5 Nm. The moped can reach a top speed of 60 kmph, which is ideal for short-distance heavy lifting and rural commuting. It is designed with a heavy-duty chassis and a split seat that can be removed for carrying additional luggage. The vehicle comes with an integrated starter generator for silent and effortless starting. It uses a synchronized braking system to provide safe and balanced stopping power. The fuel efficiency is exceptional, making it a favorite for small business owners and rural commuters alike. Its simple design ensures low maintenance costs and long-term durability. This model continues to be a staple in the Indian market due to its sheer practicality.

name: Honda Activa 125
text: Honda Activa 125 is a scooter bike. It has 124.0cc engine, gives 50 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.83 Lakh. The Honda Activa 125 is a premium 125cc scooter that offers a refined and comfortable riding experience for families. It is powered by a 124cc fuel-injected engine producing a maximum power of 8.30 PS and a peak torque of 10.4 Nm. The scooter is capable of reaching a top speed of 90 kmph, ensuring smooth performance in urban environments. It features a full-metal body that provides a robust and premium feel compared to its competitors. The latest version includes a digital-analog meter with real-time fuel efficiency indicators. It also comes with the H-Smart technology, offering keyless start and a smart find feature for convenience. The telescopic front suspension and 12-inch front wheel ensure a stable ride on uneven roads. For safety, it is equipped with a front disc brake and a combined braking system (CBS). This scooter is an excellent choice for riders who prioritize reliability and smooth engine performance.

name: Hero Xoom 110
text: Hero Xoom 110 is a scooter bike. It has 110.0cc engine, gives 53 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.76 Lakh. The Hero Xoom 110 is a sporty and technologically advanced scooter targeted at the young urban demographic. It is powered by a 110.9cc air-cooled engine that generates a maximum power of 8.15 PS and a peak torque of 8.70 Nm. The scooter can reach a top speed of 85 kmph, providing a snappy and responsive ride through city streets. A standout feature of the Xoom is the segment-first cornering lamps that illuminate the turn for better visibility. It features an aggressive design with an 'X' shaped LED headlamp and tail lamp for a modern look. The scooter is equipped with a fully digital instrument cluster that supports Bluetooth connectivity for call and SMS alerts. It uses wider tires and a front disc brake to provide superior grip and braking performance. Hero has also included its i3S technology for better fuel efficiency during idling. This model is perfect for riders looking for a stylish scooter with modern features.

name: Suzuki V-Strom 800DE
text: Suzuki V-Strom 800DE is a adventure bike. It has 776.0cc engine, gives 22 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 10.3 Lakh. The Suzuki V-Strom 800DE is a powerful middleweight adventure motorcycle launched in India for serious off-road enthusiasts. It is powered by an all-new 776cc parallel-twin engine that delivers a maximum power of 84.3 PS and a peak torque of 78 Nm. The motorcycle can comfortably reach a top speed of 190 kmph, making it a capable machine for both highways and dirt trails. It features a 21-inch front wheel and long-travel suspension for excellent off-road performance. The bike is equipped with the Suzuki Intelligent Ride System (S.I.R.S) including multiple traction control modes and a bi-directional quickshifter. A 5-inch full-color TFT instrument cluster provides clear information and easy access to ride settings. The rugged design is complemented by an adjustable windscreen and a high-clearance exhaust system. Its chassis is optimized for stability and agility on challenging terrains. This model is an ideal choice for riders who want to explore beyond the tarmac with Japanese reliability.

name: Hero Pleasure Plus
text: Hero Pleasure Plus is a scooter bike. It has 110.0cc engine, gives 50 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.74 Lakh. The Hero Pleasure Plus is a stylish and compact scooter designed primarily for female riders and urban commuters. It is powered by a reliable 110.9cc engine that delivers a maximum power of 8.1 PS and a peak torque of 8.7 Nm. The scooter reaches a top speed of 75 kmph, providing a smooth and manageable performance for daily errands. It features a retro-modern design with vibrant color options and chrome accents for a premium look. The Xtec variant includes a digital-analog cluster with Bluetooth connectivity for smartphone alerts. It also features a side-stand engine cut-off and an integrated braking system for enhanced safety. The under-seat storage is sufficient for a half-face helmet and also includes a mobile charging port. Its lightweight body and low seat height make it exceptionally easy to handle in heavy city traffic. This scooter is a practical and fashionable choice for daily city commutes.

name: Honda Dio
text: Honda Dio is a scooter bike. It has 109.0cc engine, gives 50 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.76 Lakh. The Honda Dio is one of India's most iconic and longest-running youth-oriented scooters, known for its sharp and edgy design. It is powered by a 109.51cc fuel-injected engine that produces a maximum power of 7.85 PS and a peak torque of 9.03 Nm. The scooter reaches a top speed of 83 kmph, offering a zippy and fun-to-ride character in congested city streets. It features a handle-mounted LED headlamp and a signature 'Dio' logo on the side panels for a trendy look. The vehicle comes with a fully digital instrument cluster that provides clear readouts and real-time efficiency data. It includes an external fuel filler cap and an engine start/stop switch for added rider convenience. The telescopic front suspension and Combi-Brake System (CBS) ensure a safe and stable ride quality. Its lightweight construction and compact dimensions make it highly maneuverable for young riders. This model continues to be a top seller for Honda due to its reliability and timeless style.

name: TVS Zest 110
text: TVS Zest 110 is a scooter bike. It has 109.0cc engine, gives 48 kmpl mileage. Price is usually 0.75 Lakh. The TVS Zest 110 is a stylish and lightweight scooter that is particularly popular among students and city commuters. It is powered by a 109.7cc air-cooled engine that generates a maximum power of 7.8 PS and a peak torque of 8.8 Nm. The scooter reaches a top speed of 80 kmph, making it perfect for navigating through dense urban traffic. It features a vibrant design with 3D logos and a comfortable seat for two passengers. The vehicle is equipped with a LED tail lamp and a textured floorboard for better grip and style. It offers a large 19-liter under-seat storage area, which is one of the best in its category. The telescopic front suspension and a mono-shock at the rear ensure a comfortable ride even on bumpy roads. Its compact dimensions and low kerb weight make it one of the easiest scooters to maneuver and park. This model is a reliable and pocket-friendly option for daily city navigation.
